CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2003 Off Calendar

Notice; Of Hearing On Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim Of Minor Sarah El Halees;
Off Calendar Apr-25-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Margaret Del Coto. Rebecca Paul, Esq. represented the plaintiff. Also present, Katherine Hansen, Esq. for Defendant (not present). The Court receives evidence and grants the compromise as prayed for in the petition.
